creator: paul@gromit.dlib.vt.edu
text: Salt 3005 ("Phosporous") release supports Python 3.10 but the current port Makefile restricts Python versions to 3.6--3.9.  Sysutils/py-salt will build and run with Python 3.10 if the "USES=" line in the Makefile is changed to "USES= cpe python:3.6-3.10".  The port as it currently stands will not build when the default Python version is set to 3.10.
